# The Connected Lifestyle (TCL Tech Solutions)

> San Antonio's veteran-owned smart home automation, home theater, and managed IT services company. Authorized Control4, Savant, and Lutron dealer.

The Connected Lifestyle delivers residential smart home automation, custom home theater installations, enterprise networking, and AI integration across San Antonio and South Texas. Contact: (210) 995-8655.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TCL services, portfolio, and San Antonio service area.
- [Services](/services): Smart home automation, home theater, enterprise networks, AI integration, managed services.
- [Education](/education): TCL Technician Education Plan — a 7-phase training curriculum.
- [Academy Catalog](/education/academy): Course catalog for the TCL Academy.
- [Josh.ai Tutorial](/josh-ai-tutorial): Training and configuration guide for Josh.ai voice automation.
- [OmniCode](/omnicode): TCL's 7-layer computational knowledge engine.
- [Knowledge](/knowledge): Knowledge base of articles and how-tos.
- [Glossary](/glossary): Industry terminology for smart home, AV, and network installation.
- [Press](/press): Press announcements, including Damon Jackson as 2026 Parade of Homes Co-Chair.
- [Business Plan](/business-plan): TCL strategic business plan overview.
- [Investor White Paper](/investor-white-paper): Investor-facing white paper.
- [Capital Stack](/capital-stack): $1.9M non-dilutive capital stack roadmap.
- [Builder Deck](/builder-deck): Builder and developer partnership deck.
- [Compliance](/compliance): GDPR, SOC 2, and legal compliance overview.
